title: FTS5 integrity-check results in "database disk image is malformed" for UTF-16 encoding and SUBSTR
poc: CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE vt0 USING fts5(c0);
key_bug_features: FTS5 integrity-check fails with UTF-16 and SUBSTR
bug_features_seed: CREATE VIRTUAL TABLE vt1 USING fts5(c1 TEXT, c2 INTEGER);
SELECT * FROM vt1 WHERE c2 IS NULL;
